name: gradient-button-group-demo
visual_summary: A GradientButtonGroupDemo is a component that showcases a group of gradient colored buttons with varying backgrounds and colors. This component can be used when the developer wants to visualize how to implement a gradient button group with customizable buttons in their application. It is typically used to demonstrate design concepts or as an example in an application UI.
